content.json:
# Microsoft Sentinel — Freshservice Sync Status

This workbook monitors the bidirectional synchronization between Microsoft Sentinel incidents and Freshservice ITSM tickets.

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Labels has 'freshservice' or Labels has_any('fs-ticket-')
| summarize
    Total = count(),
    Synced = countif(Labels has 'fs-ticket-'),
    Unsynced = countif(not(Labels has 'fs-ticket-'))
| extend SyncRate = round(100.0 * Synced / Total, 1)
content.title: Sync Coverage

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    Count = count() by Severity, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Incidents by Severity Over Time

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Labels has 'fs-ticket-'
| extend FreshserviceTicketId = extract('fs-ticket-(\\d+)', 1, tostring(Labels))
| project
    IncidentNumber,
    Title,
    Severity,
    Status,
    FreshserviceTicketId,
    CreatedTime,
    LastModifiedTime
| order by LastModifiedTime desc
| take 100
content.title: Incidents Synced to Freshservice

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Status == 'Closed'
| where ClosedTime > ago(1d)
| summarize ClosedBySentinel = countif(not(Labels has 'fs-ticket-')), ClosedViaFreshservice = countif(Labels has 'fs-ticket-')
content.title: Incident Closure Source
